issues.detail: The skill does not specify fallback actions when user-provided context is incomplete or missing.
The skill references a .claude-specific file, limiting compatibility with non-Claude agents.

scenarios.name: Price increase for email marketing platform with strong unit economics
scenarios.rationale: Treatment read the signals (>40% conversion, <3% churn) as the documented signs to raise, justified the increase via added features, grandfathered existing customers with a partial-increase ramp, and introduced a lower tier to capture price-sensitive segment; baseline suggested a flat price increase with a 30-day notice and no segmentation.

scenarios.name: Design paid pricing for new project-management SaaS
scenarios.rationale: Treatment selected per-seat as the value metric using the scales-with-value test, built Good-Better-Best with a recommended middle anchor, planned a Van Westendorp study before locking price points, and added a 17-20% annual discount as a churn lever; baseline copied competitor prices into three tiers without value-metric justification or research plan.
